title: Using plotting and preparation functions
text: Users can check demographic alignment burden data using check_demography_alignment(), prepare plotting using prep_plot_demography(), plot using plot_compare_demography().
code: burden <- eg_burden_template  burden <- check_demography_alignment(burden, eg_wpp) burden <- prep_plot_demography(burden)  plot_compare_demography(burden, 1)

title: Using plotting and preparation functions
text: Users can check age patterns burden data using prep_plot_age() plotting using plot_age_patterns(). Note values placeholders expect see real age-wise burden patterns look different.
code: burden <- eg_burden_template burden <- prep_plot_age(burden)  # manually set values as template default is NA, prevents ggplot warnings burden$value_millions <- 1.0  plot_age_patterns(burden, 1)

title: Using plotting and preparation functions
text: Users can check global burden decade scenario using prep_plot_burden_decades() plot_global_burden_decades().
code: burden <- eg_burden_template year_max <- 2100 burden <- prep_plot_burden_decades(burden, year_max)  # manually set values as template default is NA, prevents ggplot warnings burden$value_millions <- 1.0  plot_global_burden_decades(burden, 1)

title: Using plotting and preparation functions
text: Users can check timeseries global burdens scenario age group. contrast plotting scheme , prep_plot_global_burden() converts burden data long-format transforms data tibble nested-tibble. gives tibble many rows burden outcomes: cases, deaths, DALYs YLLs, tibble giving annual values age burden outcome. function plot_global_burden() intended applied row-wise, taking burden outcome name (e.g. “cases”) burden outcome data plot timeseries values age.
code: burden <- eg_burden_template burden <- prep_plot_global_burden(burden)  # NOTE: expected use case is to loop over nested column DFs # set values to a dummy placeholder burden$burden_data[[1]]$value_millions <- 1  plot_global_burden(   burden$burden_data[[1]],   burden$burden_outcome[[1]],   1 )

title: Using plotting and preparation functions
text: Users can check trends coverage sets using prep_plot_coverage_set() prepare coverage sets data, plot_coverage_set() prepare plot facetted country scenario.
code: # load some example data coverage <- eg_coverage coverage <- prep_plot_coverage_set(coverage)  plot_coverage_set(coverage, 1)

title: Using plotting and preparation functions
text: Users can check trends fully-vaccinated persons (FVPs) time using prep_plot_fvp() prepare FVPs sets data, plot_fvps() prepare plot facetted country scenario.
code: # load some example data fvps <- eg_fvps fvps <- prep_plot_fvp(fvps, 2030, 2040) # example data has year limits 2030-40  plot_fvp(fvps, 1)

title: Example of scenario coverage data — eg_coverage
Example of scenario coverage data — eg_coverage
text: data frame 11 rows 19 columns. scenario_type Scenario type name. scenario_type_description Scenario type description string. scenario Scenario name string. scenario_description Scenario description string. coverage_set Coverage set string. gavi_support_level String whether GAVI supported scenario. source_from String identifier source. disease Infection identifier. vaccine Vaccine identifier. activity_type Vaccination activity identifier. year Year country Country name short format; placeholder name. age_from Age limit lower limit. age_to Age limit upper limit. age_range_verbatim Description age range. target Target vaccination. coverage Proportional coverage. gender Sex data applies, may "Male", "Female", "". proportion_risk Proportional risk value.

what: Plot burden and impact diagnostics — plotting
title: Plot burden and impact diagnostics — plotting
text: Plotting functions burden impact diagnostics. functions operate data prepared plotting corresponding plotting-preparation function.

title: Plot burden and impact diagnostics — plotting
code: plot_compare_demography(data, fig_number)  plot_age_patterns(burden_age, fig_number)  plot_global_burden_decades(burden_decades, fig_number)  plot_global_burden(burden_data, outcome_name, fig_number)  plot_coverage_set(coverage_set, fig_number)  plot_fvp(fvp_data, fig_number)

title: Plot burden and impact diagnostics — plotting
text: data <data.frame> gives comparison VIMC-provided modeller-used demography values, long-format. expected output check_demography_alignment() processed prep_plot_demography(). fig_number figure number displayed plot title. burden_age <tibble> minimum column names "age", "value_millions", "burden_outcome", "scenario"; expected output prep_plot_age(). burden_decades <tibble> giving burden decade, year_max; expected output prep_plot_burden_decades(). burden_data expected <tibble> nested-<tibble> constructed using prep_plot_global_burden(). outcome_name string outcome name. Allowed outcome names given package constant constants. coverage_set <tibble> output prep_plot_coverage_set(). fvp_data <tibble> estimates fully-vaccinated persons (FVPs) per scenario, scenarios factors order number adjusted-FVPs. Expected output prep_plot_fvp().

title: Plot burden and impact diagnostics — plotting
text: <ggplot> object can printed screen plot frame saved output device (.e., saved image file).

title: Prepare data for plotting — plotting_prep
text: Transform burden estimate data modelling groups make suitable plotting using appropriate plotting function. preparation function corresponds plotting function.

title: Prepare data for plotting — plotting_prep
code: prep_plot_demography(burden)  prep_plot_age(burden)  prep_plot_burden_decades(burden, year_max)  prep_plot_global_burden(burden)  prep_plot_coverage_set(coverage)  prep_plot_fvp(fvp, year_min, year_max)

title: Prepare data for plotting — plotting_prep
text: burden prep_plot_demography(), <tibble> output check_demography_alignment(). functions, burden dataset similar eg_burden_template. year_max maximum year represented subsequent figure. prep_plot_burden_decades(), must decade, .e., multiple 10. coverage WIP. Coverage data. fvp WIP. Data counts fully vaccinated persons. year_min Minimum year.

title: Prepare data for plotting — plotting_prep
text: prep_plot_demography(): <tibble> long-format, identifier-columns, "scenario", "age", "year", added column "value_millions". prep_plot_age(): <tibble> columns "scenario", "burden_outcome", "age", "value_millions". prep_plot_burden_decades(): <tibble> columns "scenario", "burden_outcome", "decade_label", "value_millions". prep_plot_global_burden(): nested <tibble> string column "burden_outcome", list column tibbles "burden_data". prep_plot_coverage_set(): WIP prep_plot_fvp(): WIP.

title: Plotting theme for vimcheck — plotting_theme
text: simple plotting theme building ggplot2::theme_bw().

title: Plotting theme for vimcheck — plotting_theme
Plotting theme for vimcheck — plotting_theme
text: x_text_angle angle X-axis labels. Defaults 45 degrees. y_text_angle angle Y-axis labels. Defaults 0 degrees. ... <dynamic-dots> arguments passed ggplot2::theme(). applied addition , place , pre-existing elements defined theme. See examples theme's appearance.

title: Plotting theme for vimcheck — plotting_theme
text: ggplot2 theme can added ggplot2 plots objects.

title: Plotting theme for vimcheck — plotting_theme
code: # using an inbuilt dataset data(mtcars)  # standard theme ggplot2::ggplot(mtcars, ggplot2::aes(disp, mpg)) +   ggplot2::geom_point() +   theme_vimc()   # with X-axis suppression ggplot2::ggplot(mtcars, ggplot2::aes(disp, mpg)) +   ggplot2::geom_point() +   theme_vimc_noxaxis()

title: vimcheck 0.0.3
text: Separated data-prep plotting plotting functions. Added tests plotting preparation plotting functions. Removed impact FVPs checker functions. Importing rlang::.data data pronoun plotting function; works overall.

title: vimcheck 0.0.2
text: Added initial data validation functions tests. Added VIMC ggplot2 theme.

title: vimcheck 0.0.1
text: Added GHA workflows notify changed dependencies, auto-render README.md README.Rmd, update copyright year annually. Added reference VIMC paper (Echeverria-Londono et al. 2021). Added .gitattributes marking autogenerated Readme docs files .
